gene: # Pseudomonas aeruginosa PAO1 — H1, H2, H3 T6SS clusters. RefSeq NC_002516.2.

verification_notes: Russell 2011 Nature (PMID 21776080) explicitly names Tse1 as H1-T6SS effector; UniProt Q9I2Q1 confirms tse1/PA1844 in PAO1
Russell 2011 Nature (PMID 21776080) names Tse2 as H1-T6SS effector; UniProt Q9I0E0 confirms tse2/PA2702 in PAO1
Russell 2011 Nature names Tse3 as H1-T6SS effector; UniProt Q9HYC5 confirms tse3/PA3484 in PAO1
Whitney 2016 (DOI cited as PLoS Pathog 1005735); Tse4 documented H1-T6SS effector; PA2774 = tse4 in PAO1
UniProt Q9I0F4 confirms tse5/PA2684; Pissaridou 2018 PNAS (PMID 30455305) supports H1-T6SS via VgrG1b/c; Rhs effector

(a) DOI 10.1038/nsmb.3025 resolves to a different Nat Struct Mol Biol paper (Dellisanti), not the Tse6 paper; canonical Tse6 ref is Whitney 2015 Cell (10.1016/j.cell.2015.09.027, PMID 26456113). UniProt Q9I739 confirms tse6/PA0093 + H1-T6SS
Pissaridou 2018 PNAS (PMID 30455305) explicitly characterizes Tse7 as H1-T6SS DNase via VgrG1b spike; PA0099 confirmed

STRUCTURAL: VgrG1a is the T6SS spike protein, not a substrate. Hachani 2011 (10.1126/science.1128393 is wrong DOI for Hachani—actual is JBC) places PA0091 in H1-T6SS spike position. Apparatus component.
STRUCTURAL: VgrG1b spike protein (Pissaridou 2018 PMID 30455305); locus + H1 correct, but apparatus not substrate
STRUCTURAL: VgrG1c spike protein; PA2685 is in H1 Rhs operon. Apparatus, not effector. Note: Pissaridou 2018 (cited DOI) doesn't characterize VgrG1c as effector

INSTANCE: TseT is the H2-T6SS TOX-REase-5 effector at PA3907 per Burkinshaw 2018 (10.1038/s41564-018-0144-4), NOT at PA0820 in H1. PA0820 in PAO1 is dgcM/morA-region. DOI cited (10.1126/sciadv.aav0024) covers TseT/TseV/PAAR3 association
TseV nomenclature less established in literature; PA0822 may be associated with PAAR3 cluster but H1 assignment unverified; DOI 10.1126/sciadv.aav0024 (Sci Adv 2019 paywalled, can't fully verify)
LOCUS: RhsP2 is at PA14_43100 in P. aeruginosa PA14 (Sana 2024/Carruthers BCJ), NOT at PA3905. PA3905 is tecT (chaperone of TseT); RhsP2 has no PAO1 ortholog at this locus
Jiang 2014 Cell Host Microbe (10.1016/j.chom.2014.07.004, PMID 25121747) characterizes PldA/Tle5a as H2-T6SS phospholipase D effector; PA3487 confirmed

INSTANCE: Russell 2013 Nature (10.1038/nature11600, PMID 23364696) characterizes Tle family in P. aeruginosa. PA3290 may not correspond to Tle1; canonical PaTle1 is PA1510 (Tle4 family). Possible gene/locus_tag mismatch; needs verification
Berni 2019 Front Microbiol (10.3389/fmicb.2019.01218) characterizes Tle3 at PA0260 as H2-T6SS phospholipase
Berni 2019 (10.3389/fmicb.2019.01218) characterizes Tla3 at PA0259 as adaptor for Tle3 H2-T6SS effector delivery
Russell 2013 Nature (10.1038/nature11600) characterizes Tle4/TplE at PA1510 as H2-T6SS phospholipase A1
STRUCTURAL: VgrG2a is T6SS spike protein, apparatus not substrate. Sana 2016 Front Cell Infect Microbiol (10.3389/fcimb.2016.00061) is a review; doesn't establish effector status
Sana 2015 J Biol Chem (10.1126/scisignal.2004114) characterizes VgrG2b as evolved-VgrG with TseB effector C-terminus; targets eukaryotic microtubule network; H2-T6SS confirmed
DUPLICATE: Same protein as Tle4 (row 20). Jiang 2016 Cell Reports (10.1016/j.celrep.2016.07.020) confirms TplE = Tle4 = PA1510 H2-T6SS phospholipase
STRUCTURAL: PAAR4 (PA3904) is apparatus PAAR protein, not substrate. Burkinshaw 2018 (10.1038/s41564-018-0144-4, PMID 29632369) characterizes role in TseT delivery in H2-T6SS
STRUCTURAL/ROLE: TecT is the DUF4123 chaperone for TseT effector, NOT a substrate itself. PA3905 + Burkinshaw 2018 DOI correct
Jiang 2014 Cell Host Microbe (10.1016/j.chom.2014.07.004) characterizes PldB/Tle5b at PA5089 as H3-T6SS PLD effector
Lin 2017 Nat Microbiol (10.1038/nmicrobiol.2017.70) characterizes TseF at PA2374 as H3-T6SS iron-acquisition effector

Lin 2017 (10.1038/nmicrobiol.2017.70) shows azurin (PA4922) is recruited by TseF for iron uptake. Azurin itself is a periplasmic copper protein; its role as a H3-T6SS substrate is indirect (via TseF binding); UniProt P00282 confirms azu/PA4922

Si 2017 PNAS supports metal scavenging role; BTH_II1884 is chr II, not in T6SS-1 (chr I). Instance assignment may be wrong

The DOI in TSV (10.1128/IAI.01615-13) does not resolve to a known paper - likely typo. T6SS-5 instance correct
STRUCTURAL: TssM is core apparatus membrane component, not substrate

Bopa documented anti-host effector translocated by BT T6SS-5; Toesca 2024 Cell Host Microbe (10.1016/j.chom.2024.04.012); locus_tag BTH_II0876 consistent with T6SS-5 cluster
BopE was originally described as a T3SS-3 (TTSS3 BimA-region) effector in B. pseudomallei, not T6SS-5. Toesca 2024 may revisit some BopE biology but T6SS-5 binding requires verification
BopC similarly originally a T3SS-3 effector. Cluster BTH_II0865 is adjacent to T6SS-5 cluster but BopC's T6SS-5 binding requires literature support beyond Toesca 2024
STRUCTURAL: Hcp5 is apparatus tube of T6SS-5; not effector. Locus tag consistent with T6SS-5 cluster
STRUCTURAL: Hcp tube of T6SS-2; not effector. User context notes BT T6SS-2 has no characterized effectors
STRUCTURAL: VgrG2 spike of T6SS-2; not effector. DOI 10.3389/fcimb.2022.811373 is review on BT T6SSs

STRUCTURAL: VgrG3 spike of T6SS-3; not effector

STRUCTURAL: VgrG4 spike of T6SS-4; not effector

Brooks 2013 PNAS (10.1073/pnas.1222783110, PMID 23386718) characterizes VgrG-3 as evolved-VgrG with C-terminal cell-wall-degrading effector domain; large-T6SS cluster. UniProt Q9KN42 confirms vgrG3/VC_A0123

STRUCTURAL: Hcp tube protein, not substrate. LOCUS: UniProt Q9KS44 at VC_1417 is annotated as DUF4123 chaperone, NOT Hcp. Hcp-1 is at VC_1415 (different locus). Wrong UniProt/locus_tag pair

TsiH is the cognate immunity for TseH in Aux3; Santoriello 2020 supports
STRUCTURAL: PAAR spike-cap component, apparatus not effector. Aux3 cluster location consistent

STRUCTURAL: VgrG-2 is Aux2 spike, apparatus not effector. UniProt Q9KNE7 confirms vgrG2/VC_A0018
STRUCTURAL: Hcp listed as effector. LOCUS: UniProt Q9KNE6 at VC_A0019 is VasW (accessory protein), NOT Hcp-2. Hcp-2 is at VC_A0017 (different locus). Wrong UniProt and wrong locus_tag
Dong 2013 PLoS Pathog (10.1371/journal.ppat.1004031) shows TsiV2 immunity for VasX in Aux2; locus consistent
